requirements.title: Legacy SIP-to-WebRTC Mapping
requirements.description: All legacy SIP trunks must be mapped to Genesys WebRTC BYOC-P standards.

requirements.title: Global Edge Redundancy
requirements.description: Must implement Active-Active Global Edge nodes in at least two separate cloud regions (AWS/Azure).

requirements.title: Station ID Validation
requirements.description: Station IDs must be verified against the corporate directory and tokenized for PII protection.
